title: ardisia crenata var. taquetii
intro: Ardisia crenata var. taquetii is a plant species within the Ardisia genus, belonging to the family Myrsinaceae, commonly known as the Christmas berry or false yam. Traditionally, it has been used in East Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ardisia crenata var. taquetii are attributed to its ability to aid in digestion, relieve fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also dried or used in various traditional medicine forms, such as powder or capsule.
